title: TSRJC CET Answer Key 2026 - Overview

detail.title: TSRJC CET Answer Key 2026 - Overview
detail.short_info: TSRJC CET Answer Key 2026 is out for MPC, BiPC, and MEC streams. Download the official TGRJC CET key PDF, check set-wise answers, calculate scores, and know objection dates at tgrjc.cgg.gov.in.

content.text: The Telangana Residential Educational Institutions Society releases the TSRJC CET answer key so that students can verify their responses and estimate their scores before the result is announced. This helps candidates understand their chances of getting a seat in Telangana Residential Junior Colleges for the 2026-27 academic year.

rows: Telangana Residential Junior College Common Entrance Test (TSRJC CET 2026)
Telangana Residential Educational Institutions Society (TREIS / TSREIS)
MPC, BiPC, MEC (and other notified groups)
State-level entrance exam for Telangana Residential Junior Colleges

sections.heading: Direct Link to TSRJC CET Answer Key 2026

content.text: The official answer key is hosted only on the TGRJC CET portal managed by the authorities. Candidates should rely on this link instead of unofficial sources.

items: Official TSRJC CET portal: tgrjc.cgg.gov.in
Direct answer key section: “TSRJC CET Answer Key 2026” / “Download Answer Key” available on the homepage or under “Latest Notifications”
Separate PDFs may be provided for: MPC Answer Key 2026 BiPC Answer Key 2026 MEC Answer Key 2026 Each question paper set (A/B/C/D), depending on how the exam was conducted
MPC Answer Key 2026
BiPC Answer Key 2026
MEC Answer Key 2026
Each question paper set (A/B/C/D), depending on how the exam was conducted

content.text: Some coaching institutes and teachers may release memory-based keys and video solutions, but the final evaluation is always based on the official answer key issued by TREIS.
Direct Link to Download TSRJC CET Answer Key 2026

links.text: Direct Link to Download TSRJC CET Answer Key 2026

sections.heading: How to Download TSRJC CET Answer Key 2026 Online

content.text: This section guides candidates who search with “how to download TSRJC answer key” or “TSRJC CET answer key link”.
Step-by-step process to download answer key
Follow the steps below to download the TSRJC CET Answer Key 2026 from the official website:

items: Go to the official TGRJC CET portal in your browser: tgrjc.cgg.gov.in.
On the homepage, look for the link with the title “TSRJC CET Answer Key 2026” or a similar notification under the Latest Updates / Notifications section.
Click on the answer key link relevant to your group - MPC, BiPC, or MEC.
On the next page, select your question paper Set (Set A, B, C, or D) as mentioned on your question paper or OMR sheet.
The answer key PDF for that set will open in a new tab or will start downloading automatically.
Download and save the PDF file to your device. You may also take a printout for easier comparison with your responses.

content.text: If you find multiple links, carefully choose the correct stream and set to avoid confusion while cross-checking answers.

sections.heading: How to Calculate Marks Using TSRJC CET Answer Key 2026

content.text: Many candidates want to know “how to calculate score from TSRJC CET answer key”. This section explains that clearly.
Marking scheme (as per TSRJC CET pattern)

The TSRJC CET question paper is objective in nature and is generally based on the Class 10 syllabus of the relevant subjects. Each question carries equal marks and there is usually no negative marking, but candidates must confirm the exact marking scheme from the current year’s official information bulletin.
Typical pattern points you can mention (and adjust as per brochure):

items: All questions are multiple-choice questions (MCQs).
Each correct answer awards a fixed number of marks (for example, 1 mark per question).
No marks are deducted for wrong or unattempted answers, if negative marking is not applicable.
Total marks equal the number of questions multiplied by the marks per question.

content.text: Always advise candidates to check the official brochure for the final and exact details.
Step-wise method to estimate your score
To estimate your TSRJC CET 2026 score using the answer key, follow these steps:

items: Keep ready your TSRJC CET question paper, OMR sheet/response sheet, and the official answer key PDF for your set.
For each question, compare the option you marked with the correct option given in the answer key.
If your answer matches the correct option, add the prescribed marks for that question to your total.
If there is no negative marking, leave wrong or unattempted answers as they are without deducting marks.
After checking all questions, add up the marks for all correct answers to get your estimated score.
Use this estimated score for your reference; the final marks and rank will be based on the official result declared by the authorities.

content.text: This process helps you understand your performance level and plan the next steps.

sections.heading: TSRJC CET 2026 Answer Key - Important Dates

content.text: Candidates often search for “TSRJC answer key date”, “objection last date”, and “result date”. A clear date section helps them quickly find what they need.

rows: Within a few days after key release
After final answer key is released

content.text: You can update these placeholders with exact dates once they are clearly notified on the official website.

sections.heading: How to Raise Objections Against TSRJC CET Answer Key 2026 (If Allowed)

content.text: Some years, the authorities provide a facility to challenge or raise objections against the preliminary answer key. Candidates searching for “challenge TSRJC answer key” or “TSRJC CET objection form” will benefit from this section.
Who can raise objections?

items: Only candidates who appeared for TSRJC CET 2026 are generally allowed to raise objections to the preliminary answer key.
Objections are accepted only during the official objection window and in the format prescribed by the authorities.
Each objection must be supported by valid academic proof such as textbook references, officially approved materials, or other credible sources.

content.text: Steps to submit answer key challenge
If the objection facility is enabled, candidates can usually follow these steps:

items: Visit the official TGRJC CET portal: tgrjc.cgg.gov.in.
Click on the link related to “TSRJC CET 2026 Answer Key Objections / Challenge” available on the website (if displayed).
Log in using your TSRJC CET hall ticket number, date of birth, and any other required details.
Select the question number for which you want to raise an objection.
Choose the answer you believe is correct and upload scanned copies or references that support your claim.
Pay the prescribed objection fee per question, if such a fee is mentioned in the notification.
Submit the objection form and download or print the acknowledgement for your records.

content.text: After the authorities review all objections, they release a final answer key. The TSRJC CET 2026 result is normally prepared based on this final key, and no further changes are allowed.

sections.heading: TSRJC CET 2026 - Eligibility, Exam Pattern & Courses (At a Glance)

content.text: Although this article focuses on the answer key, many users landing on it may also want basic details about the exam. A concise section prevents them from bouncing back to search for “what is TSRJC” or “TSRJC eligibility”.
Basic eligibility for TSRJC CET 2026
In short, the eligibility conditions generally include:

items: Candidates should have passed or be appearing in Class 10 (SSC or equivalent) from a recognized board.
They must satisfy the age, local/non-local, and reservation criteria as specified by the Telangana Residential Educational Institutions Society.
Detailed conditions, including category-wise relaxations and other norms, are provided in the official TSRJC CET 2026 information bulletin.

content.text: Students are advised to refer to the official prospectus or notification for exact and updated eligibility details.
Exam pattern snapshot
A quick overview of the exam pattern helps candidates relate the answer key to the structure of the paper they attempted:

items: Mode of exam: Offline, OMR-based objective test.
Question type: Multiple-choice questions with four options.
Syllabus: Based on the Class 10 syllabus of relevant subjects prescribed by the Telangana State board.

Streams and subjects: MPC: questions from Mathematics and Physical Science. BiPC: questions from Biological Science and Physical Science. MEC: questions from Mathematics, Social Studies, and related subjects.
MPC: questions from Mathematics and Physical Science.
BiPC: questions from Biological Science and Physical Science.
MEC: questions from Mathematics, Social Studies, and related subjects.
Total marks and number of questions: As specified in the current year brochure.

content.text: Always remind readers to cross-check the exact pattern and scheme from the latest official document for TSRJC CET 2026.

sections.heading: TSRJC CET 2026 Result and Next Steps After Answer Key

content.text: After verifying their answers and estimating scores with the TSRJC CET Answer Key 2026, candidates will wait for the result and counselling information.

items: The TSRJC CET 2026 result will be released online on the official TGRJC CET website.
Candidates will be able to check their result by entering their hall ticket number and other required details on the result login page.
Based on the result and merit list, candidates will be called for counselling and seat allotment in Telangana Residential Junior Colleges across the state.
Counselling details such as schedule, venue, certificate verification, choice filling, and reporting instructions will be published separately on the official portal.

content.text: Candidates are advised to regularly visit the official website and keep their hall ticket and documents safe for use during result and counselling.
